emails.subject: Agenda for Members Update
emails.body: What topics do you think would be appropriate? I will have just a few minutes. I was thinking CFTC, electronic trading, physical trading forms and continued opening of power markets in North America to trading. Mark Forwarded by Mark E Haedicke/HOU/ECT on 07/17/2000 05:05 PM Rosemary Ryan <RRYAN@isda.org> 07/14/2000 01:53 PM

emails.subject: Agenda for Members Update

emails.subject: Re: Agenda for Members Update
emails.body: If you need more, there is a proposal from the documentation committee for a new alternative for calculating termination amounts (we heard about it in Amsterdam) that I think will be particularly attractive to the energy markets. I don't know where this stands officially (I haven't heard any developments since Amsterdam) but I can find out from Bob Pickle if you want. Mark E Haedicke 07/18/2000 08:58 AM
